name: GoalOS Ascension Inflow Control Room
coreThesis: A system does not ascend by maximizing autonomy or inflow. It ascends when regulated inflows become proof, verified work, Chronicle memory, and reusable capability.
equation: Trusted Work = Output × Proof × Validation × Settlement × Reuse

inflows.label: Compute
inflows.role: Powers search, simulation, execution, and verification.

inflows.label: Data
inflows.role: Grounds work in fresh, provenance-bound information.

inflows.label: Tasks
inflows.role: Supplies gradients, success criteria, and stop conditions.

inflows.label: Incentives
inflows.role: Creates selection pressure for useful verified contribution.

inflows.label: Feedback
inflows.role: Turns action into learning through tests, validators, incidents, and delayed outcomes.

inflows.label: Governance
inflows.role: Keeps autonomy permissioned, lawful, auditable, reversible, and claim-bounded.

inflows.label: Tools
inflows.role: Converts plans into external work and external risk, requiring scope and rollback.

claimBoundary: This is a browser-local public demonstration. It is not an external audit, factual certification, investment advice, legal advice, Mainnet action, or production authority.
